decontamination_notes: Real bug fix from BurntSushi/jiff PR #524, merged 2026-02-22, after model training cutoffs. jiff::civil::Date::new validated only the upper day bound (day > days_in_month) and accepted day == 0 or negative days, producing invalid Date values. The fix adds a `day < 1` guard to the range check in src/civil/date.rs. Repo sliced at the PR base commit (243d8a04). Built offline with zero external dependencies: jiff is trimmed to a standalone single crate (no workspace sub-crates, no optional/dev deps, no existing integration tests) that compiles with --no-default-features --features std, so no vendoring is needed. LOC is the real jiff source. Unlicense/MIT LICENSE preserved. Coverage floor: 3 fail_to_pass tests (day 0 and two negative days), each accepted as Ok at base and rejected as Err after the fix, plus 3 pass_to_pass regression guards (leap day ok, non-leap Feb 29 err, ordinary date ok) that hold at base and do not depend on the new guard.
